name: peers
_note: federation.peers is a lens-action macro (registered into LENS_ACTIONS via domains/index.js, dispatched (ctx, virtualArtifact, input) at server.js:39150) — it is NOT a runMacro/MACROS contract, so the assassin (which reads the derived MACROS set) does not exercise it; this override documents the live reality. It reads STATE.settings.federationPeers + the DB-backed listPeers helper (envelope-unwrapped: { ok, peers } -> array, sliced to 50) and NEVER returns no_db — the DB path is try/catch-wrapped and degrades to an empty trustGraph on minimal builds. configured exposes only { id, url, hasToken } — the raw peer token is structurally omitted, never surfaced. Returns ok:true with empty arrays for an internal/owner actor with no configured peers.
